STI-14000NC: Low-profile protective cover for indoor installation. Flush mount, open back. Function – physical protection of push button or call point against accidental or unauthorised activation. Polycarbonate housing, spring-loaded hinged lid. No hood. IP54. 137×207×50 mm. Tamper seal included. Marking – no legend.

Polycarbonate housing, spring-loaded hinged lid. Labelled hood, no buzzer. IP54. 137×207×50 mm. Tamper seal included. Marking – standard EMERGENCY EXIT legend.
